vllm.title: [Frontend] Enable decord to load video from base64
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Currently, only base64 URLs based on image frames are supported because pillow is always being used to decode the individual frames. This PR enables the use of decord to load the video (just like the case for HTTP URLs) so that other types of videos can also be passed in online inference.
FIX #10994

vllm.title: [Doc] Improve GitHub links
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR configures myst_url_schemes to automatically format links to our GitHub repo. No more copy and pasting the full URL!
cc @rafvasq

vllm.title: [Misc] Move some multimodal utils to modality-specific modules
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This is a small refactor to clean up the multimodal utils file.
After this PR, I'll work on cleaning up the encode/decode methods.

vllm.title: Mypy checking for vllm/compilation
vllm.author: lucas-tucker
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds some type checking to vllm/compilation. The methods compiled_graph and wrap_inductor may be worth looking into to ensure they always return proper computation graphs.
#3680
